base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of shao_kahn — a character (final_boss) from 1993 mortal kombat ii. Shao Kahn — final boss, Emperor of Outworld. Hammer-swing + Taunts ('You Weak Pathetic Fool'). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Shao Kahn — final boss, Emperor of Outworld. Hammer-swing + Taunts ('You Weak Pathetic Fool')
